_comment: Example configurations for different plan compliance scenarios

example_1_full_workflow.description: Full workflow with specific validation types

example_2_minimal_workflow.description: Minimal workflow with broad validation (accepts any V_* phase)

example_3_no_reproduce.description: Skip reproduction step, directly from navigation to patch

example_4_multiple_validation_types.description: Require both newly generated and regression tests

notes: The 'intended_plan' is a sequential list of required phases
Phase revisits are allowed - we only track first appearance
Prefix matches: 'L' matches any L_* phase, 'V' matches any V_* phase, 'P' matches any P_* phase
ending_flags can be any substring that appears in the command (e.g., 'submit', 'echo COMPLETE')
If agent ends without completing all intended phases, a violation is triggered
